Summary:
High-level partner discovery between Redwood and LumenForge Systems to explore reseller/channel partnership and technical integration for managed GPU/cloud offerings. Discussed target customers, joint benchmarks, VPC/private deployments, KMS integration, and procurement/timeline expectations. Agreed on pilot scope and immediate actions to run bench on LumenForge A100 cluster.

Topics: partner program, benchmarks, private deployment (VPC), security/KMS, pricing and go-to-market motions, SI enablement

title: Distributed KV watermarking & eviction incident review - Peregrine Systems
preview: Cross-team technical review after an outage where aggressive watermarking + disk spillback caused cascading latency. Discussed root causes (watermark thresholds, noisy prefixes), mitigations (per-prefix quotas, async snapshotting), and pilot plan for hybrid eviction policy and improved telemetry.
text: Cross-team technical review after an outage where aggressive watermarking + disk spillback caused cascading latency. Discussed root causes (watermark thresholds, noisy prefixes), mitigations (per-prefix quotas, async snapshotting), and pilot plan for hybrid eviction policy and improved telemetry.

title: On-prem CUDA memory leak & retry-policy investigation - Novum Health POC
preview: Deep-dive into recurring OOMs and intermittent CUDA timeouts on Novum's on-prem POC cluster. Discussed likely memory leak patterns in KV cache + batching interaction, retry semantics, driver/version mismatches, and mitigating configs (batch caps, quantization profiles, periodic cache eviction). Agreed next steps: co...
text: Deep-dive into recurring OOMs and intermittent CUDA timeouts on Novum's on-prem POC cluster. Discussed likely memory leak patterns in KV cache + batching interaction, retry semantics, driver/version mismatches, and mitigating configs (batch caps, quantization profiles, periodic cache eviction). Agreed next steps: collect full nvidia-smi/dmesg traces, reproduce with a controlled workload, run memory-heavy stress test with debug build, and try 2 kernel/driver combinations. Priority: reduce production OOM risk and define safe retry/backoff policy.

title: Hybrid channel deal sprint with ClearData
preview: Short partner GTM and technical triage. Covered deal motion, revenue split scenarios, pilot scope, security constraints (data residency + KMS), and next steps for pricing and benchmarks. Agreed to a tech pilot and follow-up legal/partner T&Cs.
text: Short partner GTM and technical triage. Covered deal motion, revenue split scenarios, pilot scope, security constraints (data residency + KMS), and next steps for pricing and benchmarks. Agreed to a tech pilot and follow-up legal/partner T&Cs.

title: POC Weekly - Low‑bit quality vs latency tradeoffs
preview: Weekly POC sync to review INT8/FP8 pilot results. Discussed per‑prompt regression hotspots, latency deltas, and fallback routing for critical low‑latency paths. Agreed on extra evals, a focused regression triage doc, and timeline for next checkpoint.
text: Weekly POC sync to review INT8/FP8 pilot results. Discussed per‑prompt regression hotspots, latency deltas, and fallback routing for critical low‑latency paths. Agreed on extra evals, a focused regression triage doc, and timeline for next checkpoint.

preview: Redwood walkthrough of per-route usage dashboards, reconciliation with FinOps, and a proposed pilot to validate per-route chargeback and KV cache savings. Customer concerned about SSO, audit logs, and cost attribution accuracy; asked for sample export and SLA/hosted vs dedicated guidance.
text: Redwood walkthrough of per-route usage dashboards, reconciliation with FinOps, and a proposed pilot to validate per-route chargeback and KV cache savings. Customer concerned about SSO, audit logs, and cost attribution accuracy; asked for sample export and SLA/hosted vs dedicated guidance.

title: LLM Porting Session: OpenAI/Anthropic → Redwood API (porting + parity checks)
preview: Redwood AE/SE walked Veridian Health through a practical porting runbook: API parity for completions, chat, streaming, embeddings, and function-calling. Discussed token accounting differences, VPC/private deployment constraints, SOC2/KMS questions, and a lightweight benchmark plan. Agreed next steps: share mapping g...
text: Redwood AE/SE walked Veridian Health through a practical porting runbook: API parity for completions, chat, streaming, embeddings, and function-calling. Discussed token accounting differences, VPC/private deployment constraints, SOC2/KMS questions, and a lightweight benchmark plan. Agreed next steps: share mapping guide, provide sample curl and SDK snippets, schedule a dedicated perf run next week.

title: HelmEdge - MoE routing & rope scaling deep dive
preview: Technical deep dive covering MoE routing cost tradeoffs, rope (RoPE) scaling effects across Llama/Mistral/Qwen, KV cache and batching strategies, quantization profiles, and deployment considerations for VPC/on-prem. SE committed to run targeted benchmarks with and without route caching and to share a perf spreadshee...
text: Technical deep dive covering MoE routing cost tradeoffs, rope (RoPE) scaling effects across Llama/Mistral/Qwen, KV cache and batching strategies, quantization profiles, and deployment considerations for VPC/on-prem. SE committed to run targeted benchmarks with and without route caching and to share a perf spreadsheet and recommended config snippets for HelmEdge's 4k token mid-latency product use case.

title: EmberTech - embeddings + rerank API walkthrough
preview: AE + SE demo of Redwood hosted API focusing on embeddings + reranker flow for improving search relevance. Showed console quickstart, API examples, Optimize suggestions for batching and caching, and a live rerank example using EmberTech sample data. Discussed latency/cost tradeoffs, private VPC option, and security d...
text: AE + SE demo of Redwood hosted API focusing on embeddings + reranker flow for improving search relevance. Showed console quickstart, API examples, Optimize suggestions for batching and caching, and a live rerank example using EmberTech sample data. Discussed latency/cost tradeoffs, private VPC option, and security docs. Agreed next steps: share pricing, SOC2 docs, and run a 2-week pilot with 1M query sample. SE to run a benchmark with EmberTech dataset.

title: Go/No-Go: Dedicated staged rollouts (beta) + incident review + launch checklist
preview: Internal go/no-go for enabling Dedicated staged rollouts for a limited beta (1–2 design partners). Reviewed early beta failures (429 spike due to canary partition starving effective capacity, gate evidence missing due to telemetry tag mismatch, and metrics cardinality regression). Aligning on ship criteria: feature ...
text: Internal go/no-go for enabling Dedicated staged rollouts for a limited beta (1–2 design partners). Reviewed early beta failures (429 spike due to canary partition starving effective capacity, gate evidence missing due to telemetry tag mismatch, and metrics cardinality regression). Aligning on ship criteria: feature flag default OFF, validated rollback/abort semantics, stable gate evaluation under telemetry lag, and audit export readiness. Decision: GO for limited beta with guardrails and explicit hold/force-promote controls restricted to admin roles; no broad enablement until SIEM export and small-pool safeguards are verified.

title: SecOps intake - Brightforge security & hosting options
preview: Initial security posture discussion and hosting preferences. Brightforge is evaluating hosted vs dedicated vs private deployment for PII-sensitive ML inference. Key asks: SOC 2/ISO evidence, SSO/SAML SSO integration, BYOK/KMS/HSM support, audit log retention/forwarding, RBAC scoping, and a short perf/latency benchma...
text: Initial security posture discussion and hosting preferences. Brightforge is evaluating hosted vs dedicated vs private deployment for PII-sensitive ML inference. Key asks: SOC 2/ISO evidence, SSO/SAML SSO integration, BYOK/KMS/HSM support, audit log retention/forwarding, RBAC scoping, and a short perf/latency benchmark before procurement decision.
